etimes'Dhurandhar 2 effect': 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' breaks Canadian theatres no interval ruleCanadian moviegoers experienced a novel 15-minute intermission during screenings of the nearly four-hour film, Dhurandhar: The Revenge. etimesArtemis II ARCHeR wristbands: What is the wearable NASA tech that astronauts will wear to the Moon?Artemis II astronauts will wear ARCHeR wristbands, advanced monitors tracking sleep, stress, and cognitive performance during their 10-day lunar mission. This high-tech tool, designed for deep-space conditions, will provide crucial data on crew adaptation. The research aims to ensure astronaut safety for future long-duration missions to the Moon and Mars.
